items.title: 7 Top AI Governance Tools for 2026 Roundup
items.summary: Atlan releases roundup of leading AI governance tools including Holistic AI, IBM Watsonx.governance, Credo AI, OneTrust, and Fiddler AI. Highlights features like EU AI Act risk classification, LLM auditing, and shadow AI mitigation.
items.domain_relevance: AI governance tools and EU AI Act compliance

items.title: AI Intelligence Weekly Top 10 for March 19, 2026
items.summary: Dwealth.news weekly report covers Big Tech AI infrastructure buildout, financial AI expansion, agentic AI, and regulators' focus on AI governance transparency and risk management.
items.domain_relevance: AI regulatory developments and governance focus

items.title: State of AI 2026 March Update on Governance Drift
items.summary: Serious Insights March update discusses shadow AI threats to compliance, U.S. federal AI framework preempting states, and Anthropic-Pentagon standoff over AI use restrictions.
items.domain_relevance: Frontier AI safety and U.S. AI regulatory developments

items.title: Top 5 AI Governance Platforms in 2026 Guide
items.summary: Maxim AI guide evaluates top platforms for runtime enforcement, EU AI Act readiness, Colorado AI Act, with pre-built policy packs for NIST, ISO 42001, and bias auditing via Holistic AI.
items.domain_relevance: EU AI Act enforcement and AI governance platforms

items.title: 10-Step Guide to AI Governance Framework for 2026
items.summary: Arthur AI publishes guide for agentic AI governance, emphasizing first-line governance, AI inventory, shadow agents detection, and enterprise visibility challenges.
items.domain_relevance: AI governance frameworks for agentic AI

items.title: Top 10 Trends Shaping AI Strategy in 2026
items.summary: Woolpert outlines trends including data quality oversight for AI, standardized approval pathways for high-risk AI actions, and audit transparency in automated decisions.
items.domain_relevance: AI governance trends and data strategy

items.title: AI Regulations Around the World 2026 Update
items.summary: Mind Foundry details global AI regs, highlighting Trump's Jan 2025 EO 14179 deregulating AI, revoking Biden's EO 14110, and shifting to private investment focus.

items.title: International AI Safety Report 2026 Released
items.summary: Report categorizes general-purpose AI risks into malicious use, malfunctions, and systemic risks, focusing on AI-generated content and safety measures.
items.domain_relevance: Frontier AI safety and systemic risks

items.title: Holistic AI Platform for EU AI Act Compliance
items.summary: Holistic AI platform maps AI assets, conducts audits, supports EU AI Act risk dashboards (high/medium/low), LLM bias checks, and shadow AI detection.
items.domain_relevance: EU AI Act enforcement and auditing

items.title: Anthropic Refuses Broadened Pentagon AI Contract
items.summary: Anthropic rejects updated U.S. government deal allowing 'anything legal' AI use without bans on surveillance or autonomous weapons; OpenAI backs stance.
